# openwrt-docs4ai — condensed OpenWrt documentation

> Generated: 2026-03-05 16:20 UTC

This repository provides LLM-optimized documentation scraped from
multiple upstream OpenWrt sources. Two consumption modes:

1. **Complete references** — single files containing all docs per source
2. **Individual files** — per-module/per-page markdown files

---

## Complete Reference Files

- [ucode-complete-reference.md](/ucode-complete-reference.md): ucode Documentation (25136 lines, 963 KB) — commit: e87be9d
- [luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md](/luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md): LuCI JS API Documentation (2610 lines, 110 KB) — commit: ec79910
- [openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md): OpenWrt Wiki Developer Docs (15633 lines, 867 KB)
- [openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md): OpenWrt Buildroot Packages (2823 lines, 68 KB) — commit: 5f704e8
- [openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md): LuCI Application Examples (11270 lines, 351 KB) — commit: ec79910

## Documentation Directories

- [ucode-docs/llms.txt](/ucode-docs/llms.txt): ucode Documentation index (15 files)
- [luci-docs/llms.txt](/luci-docs/llms.txt): LuCI JS API Documentation index (10 files)
- [openwrt-wiki-docs/llms.txt](/openwrt-wiki-docs/llms.txt): OpenWrt Wiki Developer Docs index (90 files)
- [openwrt-buildroot-docs/llms.txt](/openwrt-buildroot-docs/llms.txt): OpenWrt Buildroot Packages index (7 files)
- [openwrt-examples/llms.txt](/openwrt-examples/llms.txt): LuCI Application Examples index (0 files)

## Metadata

- [CHANGES.md](/CHANGES.md): What changed since last update
- Source: https://github.com/jow-/ucode, https://github.com/openwrt/luci, https://openwrt.org/docs/, https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt, https://github.com/openwrt/luci
